transcription.text: No more shaky video with Insta360 Flow. This mobile phone gimbal is so small and compact but yet has a built-in selfie stick that is really convenient for vlogging. With AI tracking, it's really impressive and it keeps the subject in frame even when you move out of it. It also comes with a tripod and the AI tracking got you covered. With 12 hours of battery life, you can even charge your phone while using the Insta360 Flow. Best gimbal to bring along when you travel.
